name: Artifact Cleanup Script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 2 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test-and-run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Show PowerShell and Pester versions
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $PSVersionTable.PSVersion | Out-String
          Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Select-Object Name, Version | Out-String

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            throw "Pester tests failed: $($result.FailedCount) failure(s)"
          }
          Write-Host "All $($result.PassedCount) tests passed."

      - name: "Case 1: max-age policy (reference date 2024-03-01)"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case1-max-age ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case1-max-age ==="

      - name: "Case 2: keep-latest-per-workflow policy"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="

      - name: "Case 3: combined policies dry-run"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30 `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 `
            -DryRun
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="

      - name: Verify expected outputs
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          # Case 1: artifacts from Jan 2024 are >30 days before 2024-03-01
          # build-artifacts-old and test-results-old should be deleted (both from Jan)
          # coverage-report-recent and deploy-package-recent should be retained (both from late Feb)
          #
          # We run the script again and capture output for assertion.
          $out1 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json -MaxAgeDays 30 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 1 output:`n$out1"
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out1"
          }
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out1"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 1 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 2: keep only 1 latest per workflow
          # wf-A: 3 artifacts → keep wf-A-run3-artifact (newest), delete run1 and run2
          # wf-B: 2 artifacts → keep wf-B-run2-artifact (newest), delete run1
          $out2 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 2 output:`n$out2"
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*3') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 3 deletions. Output was: $out2"
          }
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out2"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 2 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 3: combined age + keep-latest, dry run
          # expired-large-build (Jan 1): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-old-run (Jan 20): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-new-run (Feb 15): within 30 days, newest in wf-X → keep
          # wf-Y-only (Feb 25): within 30 days, only in wf-Y → keep
          $out3 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
                    -MaxAgeDays 30 -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 -DryRun | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 3 output:`n$out3"
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'DRY RUN') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected DRY RUN label. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out3"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 3 assertions PASSED"

          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "All verification assertions PASSED."

content.content:
# Custom act container image with PowerShell and Pester pre-installed.
# Matches what real GitHub-hosted ubuntu-latest runners provide.
#
# Build:  docker build -t act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest -f Dockerfile.act .
# Use:    act push -P ubuntu-latest=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest
# Or:     echo '-P ubuntu-latest=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest' > .actrc

FROM catthehacker/ubuntu:act-latest

# Install PowerShell from Microsoft's APT repo
RUN apt-get update -qq \
    && apt-get install -y -qq wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common \
    && wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/22.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb" \
    && dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb \
    && apt-get update -qq \
    && apt-get install -y -qq powershell \
    && rm -f packages-microsoft-prod.deb \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Pester 5 (PowerShell testing framework, pre-installed on GitHub runners)
RUN pwsh -NoProfile -Command " \
    Set-PSRepository -Name PSGallery -InstallationPolicy Trusted; \
    Install-Module -Name Pester -MinimumVersion 5.0 -Force -Scope AllUsers; \
    Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Select-Object -Property Name,Version"

# Verify installation
RUN pwsh --version \
    && pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module Pester; Write-Host 'Pester OK'"

name: Artifact Cleanup Script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 2 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test-and-run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Show PowerShell and Pester versions
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $PSVersionTable.PSVersion | Out-String
          Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Select-Object Name, Version | Out-String

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            throw "Pester tests failed: $($result.FailedCount) failure(s)"
          }
          Write-Host "All $($result.PassedCount) tests passed."

      - name: "Case 1: max-age policy (reference date 2024-03-01)"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case1-max-age ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case1-max-age ==="

      - name: "Case 2: keep-latest-per-workflow policy"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="

      - name: "Case 3: combined policies dry-run"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30 `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 `
            -DryRun
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="

      - name: Verify expected outputs
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          # Case 1: artifacts from Jan 2024 are >30 days before 2024-03-01
          # build-artifacts-old and test-results-old should be deleted (both from Jan)
          # coverage-report-recent and deploy-package-recent should be retained (both from late Feb)
          #
          # We run the script again and capture output for assertion.
          $out1 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json -MaxAgeDays 30 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 1 output:`n$out1"
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out1"
          }
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out1"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 1 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 2: keep only 1 latest per workflow
          # wf-A: 3 artifacts → keep wf-A-run3-artifact (newest), delete run1 and run2
          # wf-B: 2 artifacts → keep wf-B-run2-artifact (newest), delete run1
          $out2 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 2 output:`n$out2"
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*3') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 3 deletions. Output was: $out2"
          }
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out2"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 2 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 3: combined age + keep-latest, dry run
          # expired-large-build (Jan 1): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-old-run (Jan 20): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-new-run (Feb 15): within 30 days, newest in wf-X → keep
          # wf-Y-only (Feb 25): within 30 days, only in wf-Y → keep
          $out3 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
                    -MaxAgeDays 30 -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 -DryRun | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 3 output:`n$out3"
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'DRY RUN') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected DRY RUN label. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out3"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 3 assertions PASSED"

          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "All verification assertions PASSED."

content.thinking:
19 Pester tests all pass. The verification step is failing because `$out1` is empty/null. 

The issue is with how the script captures output. The `./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1` script uses `Write-Host` which doesn't go to the pipeline output. `Out-String` collects the pipeline output but `Write-Host` bypasses the pipeline and goes directly to the host. So `$out1` is empty.

I need to fix the "Verify expected outputs" step to capture stdout properly. Options:
1. Change the script to use `Write-Output` instead of `Write-Host`


2. Use `& { ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 ... } | Out-String` with `$InformationPreference` settings
3. Use `*>&1` to capture all streams
4. Redirect output in the workflow step

The simplest fix is to use `*>&1 | Out-String` to capture all output streams including the host stream. Actually, `Write-Host` in PowerShell goes to the information stream (stream 6), so I need to redirect that specific stream to capture it properly.

Capturing output with redirection... I'm realizing the simplest approach is to just use `6>&1` in the verification step to capture the Write-Host output, rather than modifying the script itself and changing its existing behavior.

name: Artifact Cleanup Script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 2 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test-and-run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install actionlint
        run: |
          ACTIONLINT_VERSION=1.7.7
          curl -sSfL \
            "https://github.com/rhysd/actionlint/releases/download/v${ACTIONLINT_VERSION}/actionlint_${ACTIONLINT_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" \
            | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin actionlint
          actionlint --version

      - name: Show PowerShell and Pester versions
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $PSVersionTable.PSVersion | Out-String
          Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Select-Object Name, Version | Out-String

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            throw "Pester tests failed: $($result.FailedCount) failure(s)"
          }
          Write-Host "All $($result.PassedCount) tests passed."

      - name: "Case 1: max-age policy (reference date 2024-03-01)"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case1-max-age ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case1-max-age ==="

      - name: "Case 2: keep-latest-per-workflow policy"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case2-keep-latest ==="

      - name: "Case 3: combined policies dry-run"
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== TEST CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="
          ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
            -MaxAgeDays 30 `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 `
            -DryRun
          Write-Host "=== END CASE: case3-dry-run-combined ==="

      - name: Verify expected outputs
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          REFERENCE_DATE: "2024-03-01"
        run: |
          # Case 1: artifacts from Jan 2024 are >30 days before 2024-03-01
          # build-artifacts-old and test-results-old should be deleted (both from Jan)
          # coverage-report-recent and deploy-package-recent should be retained (both from late Feb)
          #
          # We run the script again and capture output for assertion.
          $out1 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case1-max-age.json -MaxAgeDays 30 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 1 output:`n$out1"
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out1"
          }
          if ($out1 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 1 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out1"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 1 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 2: keep only 1 latest per workflow
          # wf-A: 3 artifacts → keep wf-A-run3-artifact (newest), delete run1 and run2
          # wf-B: 2 artifacts → keep wf-B-run2-artifact (newest), delete run1
          $out2 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case2-keep-latest.json -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 2 output:`n$out2"
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*3') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 3 deletions. Output was: $out2"
          }
          if ($out2 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 2 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out2"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 2 assertions PASSED"

          # Case 3: combined age + keep-latest, dry run
          # expired-large-build (Jan 1): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-old-run (Jan 20): older than 30 days → delete
          # wf-X-new-run (Feb 15): within 30 days, newest in wf-X → keep
          # wf-Y-only (Feb 25): within 30 days, only in wf-Y → keep
          $out3 = ./Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 -FixturePath fixtures/case3-dry-run-combined.json `
                    -MaxAgeDays 30 -KeepLatestPerWorkflow 1 -DryRun | Out-String
          Write-Host "Case 3 output:`n$out3"
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'DRY RUN') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected DRY RUN label. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts to delete\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 deletions. Output was: $out3"
          }
          if ($out3 -notmatch 'Artifacts retained\s*:\s*2') {
            throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected 2 retained. Output was: $out3"
          }
          Write-Host "Case 3 assertions PASSED"

          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "All verification assertions PASSED."

# wf-X-new-run (Feb 15): within 30 days, newest in wf-X → keep

throw "Case 3 FAILED: expected DRY RUN label. Output was: $out3"
